Metadata.title: Maksym & Diana — 28.06.2026
Metadata.description: Wedding invitation of Maksym and Diana. June 28, 2026, Grand Hotel Terminus, Bergen, Norway.

OurStory.title: Our Story
OurStory.subtitle: Our journey of love
OurStory.how_we_met_text: Our journey began unexpectedly, but from the very first meeting, we knew we had found something special. Through years of support, laughter, and shared dreams, our love story has brought us to this special day. We look forward to sharing our joy with you and creating many more unforgettable memories together.

ceremony.title: Wedding Ceremony
ceremony.description: The beginning of our journey together

photo_session.title: Break & Photo Session
photo_session.description: Time for beautiful photos and light socializing

banquet.title: Wedding Banquet
banquet.description: Dinner, warm toasts, and first dance

cake.title: Wedding Cake
cake.description: A sweet moment of our celebration

sparklers.title: Sparklers
sparklers.description: A beautiful end to the evening under the glow of lights

Location.title: Location
Location.subtitle: We look forward to seeing you here
Location.description: A historic hotel in the heart of Bergen, where timeless elegance meets modern comfort.

DressCode.title: Dress Code
DressCode.subtitle: Style Wishes
DressCode.ladies_description: Dear ladies, you will look magnificent in outfits of pastel shades:
DressCode.gentlemen_description: Gentlemen, do not limit yourself to only black — we've added light shades to allow for more diverse looks. We also ask you to refrain from jeans.

RSVP.title: RSVP
RSVP.subtitle: Please let us know if you can make it by June 1st
RSVP.dietary_placeholder: Do you have any special dietary needs?
RSVP.success: Thank you! Your response has been saved.
RSVP.attendance_required: * Please select if you are attending
RSVP.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

Gifts.title: Gifts
Gifts.subtitle: Our Wishes
Gifts.description: To keep things simple, we would be sincerely grateful for your contributions in white envelopes. These gifts will help our new family cover the banquet costs (suggested amount — from <bold>1300 NOK</bold> or <bold>120 €</bold> per guest). Thank you for your understanding and for supporting our very first step into married life!

Footer.made_with_love: Made with love for our big day
